caption: Figure 1: Accuracy of the model training in the sub- sampled dataset minus the accuracy of the model training on a randomly subsampled dataset.
description2: The figure plots the difference in accuracy between model training on a subsampled dataset and a randomly subsampled dataset.
description3: A line chart displays the difference in model training accuracy between two datasets over a range of values on the horizontal axis.
questions: How does the model's accuracy change when using a sub-sampled dataset?
What is the general trend in the difference of model accuracy between datasets?
